name: snap-db
description: Fast & Durable pure javascript key-value store for NodeJS/Electron

scripts.build: rm -rf bin && mkdir -p bin && tsc && node scripts/write-esm-wrapper.cjs
scripts.test: npm run build && rm -rf testDB* && vitest run --pool=threads bin/tests/multi.test.js && rm -rf testDB* && vitest run --pool=threads bin/tests/single.test.js && rm -rf testDB*
scripts.test-multi: npm run build && rm -rf testDB* && vitest run --pool=threads bin/tests/multi.test.js && rm -rf testDB*
scripts.test-single: npm run build && rm -rf testDB* && vitest run --pool=threads bin/tests/single.test.js && rm -rf testDB*

author: Scott Lott <Scott@ClickSimply.com>
